short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal diverts US focus
rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at its established high baseline; the US-Iran peace deal announcement raises continued concern about US attention and resources being diverted away from Ukraine, but no new qualitative change from last cycle.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues; Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' war dead
top_events.summary: Active combat continues with no qualitative change; the AI story reflects the human toll of the war but signals no new military development affecting Ukrainian daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal announced; Trump says Strait of Hormuz reopening
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal continues to raise concern in Ukraine that US diplomatic and military attention is diverted from Ukrainian support, but no new qualitative shift from last cycle.

top_events.title: Lebanese remain sceptical despite US-Iran ceasefire announcement
top_events.summary: Regional doubts about the deal's durability are noted but have no direct bearing on Ukraine's military situation or Western support flows.
